notes: rapidapi_host is best-effort (verify against the live RapidAPI listing). The spec's RapidAPI host is 'real-time-home-depot-data.p.rapidapi.com'. /search, /products-by-category, /item-lookup are page-number paginated (page 1-30, items_per_page 1-48, default 24); products live at data.products[]. /product-reviews is page-number paginated (page 1-51, items_per_page 1-100, default 20); reviews live at data.reviews[]. /product-details is a single call (no pagination), keyed by item_id or url.
